title: DNV Appointed OwnerГўв‚¬в„ўs Engineer for CadentГўв‚¬в„ўs Hydrogen Pipeline Feed
content: DNV has been appointed by Cadent as OwnerГўв‚¬в„ўs Engineer for the Front-End Engineering Design (FEED) of the H2East Pipeline: Humber to Nottinghamshire. This critical infrastructure project aims to anchor the UKГўв‚¬в„ўs emerging hydrogen transmission network by connecting production sites with industrial demand centers. DNV will leverage its specialized hydrogen competence and testing facilities to review the design, ensuring it is technically robust, safe, and buildable. By identifying risks early and applying real-world research data, DNV aims to prevent costly redesigns and ensure compliance with regulatory standards. Funded through OfgemГўв‚¬в„ўs Net Zero process, the pipeline is essential for decarbonizing heavy industry and enhancing energy security. DNV leadership emphasized the importance of rigorous engineering to support the safe scaling of the UKГўв‚¬в„ўs cleaner fuel economy.
author: Analysts Account
